title: FailureLibraryQuery v1
description: Project-local bounded failure-reflection query. Matching is limited to tags and failure_modes; broad text retrieval is not a supported search.step surface.

failure_modes.description: Optional bounded failure-mode labels used with tags for matching.

text.description: Reserved for future compatibility only. search.step rejects non-empty failure_library.query.text and does not use it for broad retrieval.

output_artifact_path.description: Project-relative output path for FailureLibraryHits. Must live under artifacts/.
